columns.name: game_id
columns.comment: The identifier for a specific game, which helps in tracking and referencing the game across various datasets.

columns.name: season
columns.comment: Represents the NFL season during which the game is played, indicating the year and context within the league's calendar.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Indicates the week of the season in which the game occurs, useful for analyzing weekly trends and matchups.

columns.name: game_type
columns.comment: Describes the type of game being analyzed, such as regular season, playoffs, or other classifications relevant to NFL scheduling.

columns.name: gameday
columns.comment: The date of the game, providing context for when the event takes place and aiding in time-specific analyses.

columns.name: home_team
columns.comment: The name of the team playing at home, key for evaluating team performance and fan engagement for home games.

columns.name: away_team
columns.comment: The name of the team playing away, essential for assessing the dynamics of matchups and travel impacts on performance.

columns.name: spread_line
columns.comment: Indicates the spread line for the game, representing the predicted point difference between the two teams as set by bookmakers.

columns.name: total_line
columns.comment: Represents the total points line, which is the combined score expected from both teams, crucial for over/under betting analysis.

columns.name: away_moneyline
columns.comment: The moneyline odds for the away team, reflecting the potential payout for a bet placed on them to win straight up.

columns.name: home_moneyline
columns.comment: The moneyline odds for the home team, indicating the payout potential for bets placed on their victory without a point spread.

columns.name: away_spread_odds
columns.comment: The odds associated with the away team's spread, providing insight into how bookmakers view their likelihood of covering the point spread.

columns.name: home_spread_odds
columns.comment: The odds for the home team's spread, offering an understanding of their expected performance relative to the established point spread.

columns.name: under_odds
columns.comment: Odds for wagering on the total score being under the total line, indicating sentiment regarding lower scoring games.

columns.name: over_odds
columns.comment: Odds for betting on the total score being over the total line, which reflects expectations for higher scoring games.

columns.name: source
columns.comment: Identifies the source of the odds data, ensuring transparency and traceability for the information provided.

columns.name: bookmaker
columns.comment: The name of the bookmaker providing the odds, essential for understanding variability and strategies in betting markets.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: Timestamp indicating when the odds data was collected or recorded, useful for data versioning and historical analysis.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: The name of the source file from which the data was ingested, aiding in data lineage and quality control processes.
